pi_items.source: examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/stop_container/setup_task.sh:27-45 (setup hook pulls the official nginx:alpine image from Docker Hub and runs the container with --name test-web-server, matching the claimed target).

privileged_info_summary: Verified: the pre-task hook pulls the public nginx:alpine image and starts the container named 'test-web-server', which is the object the agent must stop.
